headline: New Fluke TLPV2 Solar Test Lead Set Eliminates Risky Live-Box Voltage Measurements in Operating PV Systems
summary: New Y-style MC4 test leads enable safer operating voltage measurements on live PV systems without opening energized enclosures New Fluke TLPV2 Solar Test Lead Set Eliminates Risky Live-Box Voltage Measurements New Y-style MC4 test leads enable safer operating voltage measurements on live PV systems New Fluke TLPV2 Solar Test Lead Set Eliminates Risky Live-Box Voltage Measurements New Y-style MC4 test leads enable safer operating voltage measurements on live PV systems Eindhoven, Netherlands, Jul
